title: dolichos dewildemanianus
intro: Dolichos dewildemanianus, a climbing legume native to tropical Africa, belongs to the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dolichos dewildemanianus include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or ointments, which are applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal benefits.
